query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `regulation_monitor_seen` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `publication_url` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `first_seen_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `notified` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  UNIQUE KEY `regulation_monitor_seen_publication_url_unique` (`publication_url`(512)),
  INDEX `rms_source_idx` (`source`),
  INDEX `rms_seen_at_idx` (`first_seen_at`)
);

  `first_seen_at` bigint NOT NULL,
